## Validation

- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `python -m mypy src --ignore-missing-imports`
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python production_validation.py`
- [ ] `python -m build`
- [ ] `python -m twine check dist/rigout-*`
